name: Ponytail

github_snapshot.source: GitHub REST API, git ls-remote, raw files, and temporary shallow clone

suitable_for: AI 编码 Agent 规则集和技能分发学习
多宿主插件适配和生命周期 hook 设计学习
过度工程审查、最小实现策略和 benchmark 复现实验
not_suitable_for: 把 README benchmark 当作跨模型、跨会话成本承诺
替代正常的安全、正确性、可访问性和边界验证
未经隔离直接在主力 Codex 或 Claude Code 配置中信任生命周期 hooks
maintainer_notes: Latest snapshot refresh. GitHub API, README, AGENTS.md, adapter portability docs, plugin manifests, hooks, skills, commands, benchmarks, examples, workflow, and tests were checked through a temporary shallow clone at v4.8.3. Full npm test passed after using a temporary venv with pandas and a venv-local python3 shim because the upstream correctness harness probes python3 before python on Windows. Real host install, hook trust, SubagentStart host behavior, and promptfoo API benchmark remain not_run.
